title: Work with Us
text:
Let’s work together. RAND’s deep expertise and wide-ranging research capabilities allow us to solve complex problems across public policy areas.
If you’re interested in commissioning RAND to conduct research for your organization, then reach out to one of the following contacts—or fill out the form below.
RAND Commercial Price List
RAND is able to offer its research capabilities to commercial clients through a variety of contractual vehicles, including our Commercial Business Practice, which operates on a Time & Material basis. For additional information regarding entering into a business relationship with RAND and to request a copy of RAND’s Commercial Price List, please contact RAND’s Office of Contracts & Grants at ContractsTeam@rand.org. Serious inquiries only.
General Inquiries
Not sure who to contact? Fill out this form, and we’ll make sure the right person gets back to you.
Email address
Message
